title: Complete CSS rewrite: design tokens + all component styles
description: Rewrite the entire CSS section of panel/index.js (lines 59-720 style property + lines 724-1300 template style block) following the ui-ux-pro-max design system. This includes: (1) replacing all design tokens with compact IDE values, (2) rewriting every component style rule for 20-24px controls, (3) replacing indigo accent with green #22C55E, (4) converting flexbox gap to margin-based spacing for Electron 2 compat, (5) settings modal CSS becomes settings page CSS (full-panel replacement). The CSS must produce a dark OLED theme with WCAG AAA contrast ratios.

criteria: All ui-button heights reduced to 24px (toolbar) or 20-22px (list items/chips)
Search input #com_name height=24px, padding=0 4px, font-size=12px, border-bottom 1px only (no full border)
Container padding=4-6px, item gaps=2-4px via margin (NO flexbox gap property)
Search result .search-result height=22-24px, font-size=12px, no cards/shadows, flat list with 1px separator
Component bar #coms chips 20px height, 4px h-padding, 11px font, horizontal scroll
Empty state .list-state collapsed to single-line muted text, max 20px height
Settings CSS rewritten for full-panel view (no modal overlay, no fixed positioning, no 520px width)
Zero instances of flexbox gap property (replaced with margin-based spacing)
All border-radius values reduced: sm=2px, md=3px, lg=4px
Transitions: 150ms duration for all color changes
Icon sizes: 14px for toolbar, 12px for list items via .icon-sm/.icon-md classes
convergence.verification: Visual inspection in Cocos Creator editor: panel renders correctly at 300px and 450px widths, 120px height. All interactive elements visible without scrolling in default state.
convergence.definition_of_done: The panel CSS produces a compact, dark IDE-style appearance matching the design system specification with no mobile-sized elements.

changes: Replace all :host CSS custom properties with compact IDE values
Rewrite .container: padding 4px, no flexbox gap (use child margins)
Rewrite .row: height 24px, gap replaced with margin-right on children
Rewrite .row ui-button: 24px height, transparent bg, 14px icon, hover=#334155
Rewrite #com_name: 24px height, 4px padding, border-bottom 1px only, 12px font
Rewrite .search-result: 22-24px height, 2px 6px padding, 12px font, no border-radius
Rewrite .list-state: remove min-height, single-line muted text
Rewrite .results-meta: inline styling (will be merged into search row in TASK-002)
Add .icon-sm (12px) and .icon-md (14px) icon size classes, update .icon sizing
Rewrite settings modal CSS as settings page CSS (full-panel replacement)
Add .settings-page styles: full-width, scrollable, compact sections
Settings controls: 20px height inputs/toggles, 11px section headers

actions: Replace spacing tokens: xs=2px, sm=4px, md=6px, lg=8px, xl=12px
Replace color tokens: primary=#0F172A, secondary=#1E293B, accent=#22C55E
Replace text colors: primary=#F8FAFC, muted=#94A3B8
Replace radius tokens: sm=2px, md=3px, lg=4px, xl=6px
Set --font-size-body to 12px, add --font-size-small: 11px
Set transition duration tokens to 150ms
Set .container padding to 4px, remove gap property, add > * + * { margin-top: 2px }
Set .row height to 24px, align-items: center, remove gap, add > * + * { margin-left: 4px }
Set .row ui-button to 24px square, transparent bg, border:none, cursor:pointer
Add .row ui-button:hover { background: #334155 }
Ensure no flexbox gap property exists anywhere in the style block

implementation.description: Rewrite search input and results styles
actions: Set #com_name to height:24px, padding:0 4px, font-size:12px, border:none, border-bottom:1px solid #334155
Set .list-items to display:flex, flex-direction:column (single column list, no grid)
Set .search-result to height:22px, padding:0 6px, font-size:12px, display:flex, align-items:center
Add .search-result:hover { background: #334155 }
Add subtle 1px separator between results via border-bottom or + selector
Set .results-meta to font-size:11px, color:#94A3B8, inline display
Set #coms to display:flex, flex-direction:row, overflow-x:auto, max-height:24px, padding:2px
Replace gap with margin-right:4px on children
Set #coms ui-button to height:20px, padding:0 4px, font-size:11px, border-radius:2px
Set chip background to #1E293B, text #F8FAFC
Delete X button: 14px, visible only on hover via parent:hover .delete-btn { opacity: 1 }
Set .coms-wrap min-height to 24px (was 44px)

implementation.description: Rewrite empty/loading states and settings page CSS
actions: Collapse .list-state to single-line: remove min-height, set padding:2px 6px, font-size:11px, color:#94A3B8
Remove skeleton grid styles or reduce to 2 items at 20px height
Convert settings modal CSS to settings page: remove overlay/fixed/520px, add full-width flow layout
Settings sections: 1px separator, 11px uppercase muted headers, 20px control height
Settings back button: 24px height, left-aligned in toolbar area

reference.pattern: IDE/DevTool compact UI (VS Code, Chrome DevTools panel sizing)
reference.examples: VS Code sidebar panels use 22px item height, 4px padding, system fonts. Chrome DevTools uses similar compact sizing with dark backgrounds.

rationale.chosen_approach: Complete CSS rewrite rather than incremental adjustments because the entire design token system and sizing paradigm is wrong (mobile vs desktop). Changing tokens alone would cascade incorrectly due to interdependent !important overrides.
alternatives_considered: Incremental CSS patches (too fragile, !important cascades make partial changes unpredictable)
CSS-in-JS approach (not compatible with Cocos Creator Editor.Panel.extend pattern)
External CSS file (requires fs.readFileSync, adds complexity for no benefit)
rationale.tradeoffs: Large diff size for the CSS section; all styles change simultaneously rather than incrementally

risks.description: ui-button Shadow DOM styles may resist compact sizing below certain thresholds
risks.mitigation: Test 20px and 24px heights with !important overrides; if 20px fails, use 24px as minimum
risks.fallback: Use min-height instead of height for flexibility

risks.description: Removing flexbox gap may cause margin collapse issues in nested flex containers
risks.mitigation: Use > * + * adjacent sibling selector pattern which is immune to margin collapse in flexbox

manual_checks: Panel renders at 300px width without horizontal overflow
Panel renders at 450px width with proper proportions
Panel at 120px height shows search bar + at least 2 results
All colors match design system (bg #0F172A, accent #22C55E, text #F8FAFC)
Hover states show #334155 background on all clickable elements
No flexbox gap usage found in CSS (search for 'gap:' outside grid context)
success_metrics: Total vertical consumption of fixed UI elements (toolbar + component bar) <= 56px
Zero instances of 44px in any CSS rule
Zero instances of #6366f1 or indigo in any CSS rule

commit.message_template: refactor(panel-css): complete CSS rewrite with compact IDE design tokens
